hero.title:
Our dental practice:
the continuity of an ancient medical art
hero.subtitle: Since its millenary origins, dental medicine has evolved with one constant goal: preserving the health, function, and quality of life of today's patient.

intro.slogan: Medical expertise, current technology, and a trusted relationship.
intro.title: Our practice is part of this historical continuity with a modern vision, grounded in current scientific evidence and individualized care.
intro.description: Each specialty is approached with a rigorous diagnosis, clear patient information, and multidisciplinary coordination whenever needed.
intro.extendedDescription: Beyond specialties, we are committed to attentive listening, personalized and evolving treatment plans, evidence-based practice, and a lasting relationship of trust.

tech.title: Maximum preservation
tech.desc: The natural tooth is always prioritized whenever conservative treatment is clinically possible.

painless.title: Evidence-based medicine
painless.desc: Materials and protocols are selected according to current scientific evidence.

transparency.title: Clear information
transparency.desc: Every indication is explained transparently, including alternatives and postoperative expectations.

expertTeam.title: Long-term follow-up
expertTeam.desc: Regular follow-up is organized to maintain functional and biological outcomes over time.

everythingYouNeed.more: Each therapeutic decision is tailored to your clinical situation.

hero.subtitle: OUR VISION
hero.title:
The continuity of an ancient medical art
in the service of today's patient
hero.description: Since Antiquity, dental medicine has evolved to preserve health, function, and quality of life. Our practice extends this history through modern, individualized, and scientifically grounded care.

mission.title: Our commitment
mission.description: Combining medical expertise, current technology, and a trusted relationship to deliver precise, clear, and durable care.

benevolence.title: Listening
benevolence.desc: Dedicated explanation time for each patient and family.

excellence.title: Clinical rigor
excellence.desc: Comprehensive diagnosis, occlusal analysis, and personalized planning.

safety.title: Reasoned decisions
safety.desc: Benefit-risk assessment and multidisciplinary coordination before each procedure.

approach.subtitle: CARE PATHWAY
approach.title:
A care process
coordinated and evolving

1.title: Comprehensive clinical assessment
1.desc: Clinical and functional analysis with imaging to define an accurate indication.

2.title: Personalized treatment plan
2.desc: Therapeutic choices are explained, including alternatives and long-term goals.

3.title: Follow-up and prevention
3.desc: Regular reviews, adjustments, and relapse prevention over time.

hero.title: Our specialties
hero.description: Each specialty is approached with a modern vision, grounded in current scientific evidence and individualized care.

descriptions.surgery: From emergency extraction to reasoned surgery: current protocols, clear information, and interdisciplinary coordination.
descriptions.esthetic: Harmonious smile enhancement that respects biology and dental tissues.
descriptions.orthodontics: Preventive and corrective orthodontic care for children, teenagers, and adults.
descriptions.general: Preserving the natural tooth through conservative and minimally invasive dentistry.
descriptions.implantology: Replacing missing teeth with rigorous planning and discussion of alternatives.

cards.title: Preserving the natural tooth: an old principle, a modern standard
cards.description: From empirical recipes in Antiquity to the first fillings described by Pierre Fauchard in the 18th century, conservative dentistry gradually became a scientific discipline.
offerings: Maximum preservation of natural teeth
Modern materials validated by scientific evidence
Patient comfort and clear explanation of treatments
Regular follow-up to maintain oral health

cards.title: Correct, support, stabilize
cards.description: From empirical alignment attempts in Antiquity to a structured specialty in the 20th century, orthodontics now integrates biomechanics, craniofacial growth, and digital tools.
offerings: Comprehensive orthodontic assessment adapted to age
Preventive care in children and corrective care in adults
Braces and clear aligners selected by indication
Focus on stability and relapse prevention

cards.title: From emergency extraction to reasoned surgery
cards.description: Anesthesia, asepsis, and modern imaging transformed dental surgery into a controlled discipline integrated into global treatment plans.
offerings: Procedures performed under current medical protocols
Precise benefit-risk assessment
Clear information about indications and postoperative care
Coordination with other specialties when required

cards.title: Replacing missing teeth: a major 20th-century advance
cards.description: Modern implantology is based on titanium osseointegration discovered by Branemark in the 1950s, transforming the management of edentulism.
offerings: Rigorous medical evaluation before implant indication
Planning integrated into the global prosthetic project
Complete information about available alternatives
Prudent approach based on current scientific data

cards.title: When function meets smile harmony
cards.description: Modern dental esthetics aims for natural smile enhancement, not artificial transformation, while respecting biology.
offerings: Reasoned esthetic approach respectful of tissues
Smile analysis integrated with facial and functional balance
Solutions adapted to expectations without standardization
Guidance in selecting esthetic treatment options

cta.subtitle: CARE PHILOSOPHY
cta.title:
A dentistry that is
human, modern,
and personalized
cta.description: Our group practice combines orthodontics, general dentistry, surgery, and implantology for coherent, prudent, and durable care.

hero.subtitle: PATHWAY
hero.title:
From the history of dental medicine
to today's clinical practice
hero.description: Every field in our practice follows the same direction: protect function, respect biology, and secure long-term stability.

1.title: Conservative care
1.desc: From pain relief in Antiquity to minimally invasive dentistry today.

2.title: Child orthodontics
2.desc: Preventive and interceptive approach during growth to guide function.

3.title: Adult orthodontics
3.desc: Braces and clear aligners selected according to medical indication.

4.title: Dental surgery
4.desc: Procedures integrated into global plans with reasoned indications and current protocols.

5.title: Modern implantology
5.desc: Global prosthetic planning with full discussion of alternatives.

6.title: Dental esthetics
6.desc: Smile harmony achieved with respect for tissues and function.

gallery.explore: Explore the main clinical pillars of our group practice.

cta.title: Would you like a personalized opinion?

hero.title: Our smile dream team
hero.description: The practice brings together an orthodontist, a general dental surgeon, and a dedicated assistant team for comprehensive and multidisciplinary care.

members.name: Dr Awatif Zaki Ziraoui
members.description: State Doctor in Dental Surgery, graduate of the University of Monastir, and former hospital fellow in Liege. She manages orthodontic care for children, adolescents, and adults, including clear aligners, sleep-disordered breathing support, and functional TMJ evaluation.

members.name: Dr Nawar Dellero
members.description: Doctor of Dental Medicine, graduated from the Faculty of Dental Medicine of Rabat, Mohammed V University. Her practice is built on prevention, precise diagnosis, conservative care, periodontology, prosthetics, and smile esthetics, in coordination with the other specialties.

members.name: Ilham
members.description: Always smiling and attentive, she ensures warm reception, rigorous administrative follow-up, and reliable appointment reminders for each patient.

members.name: Ghizlane
members.description: Experienced in orthodontics, she supports care with kindness, reassures patients, and explains each treatment step with patience.

members.name: Loubna
members.description: Gentle, discreet, and efficient, she contributes to smooth care with warm and reassuring professionalism.

cta.title:
A team
coordinated around the patient
cta.description: Each treatment plan is based on rigorous clinical diagnosis, analysis of occlusion, function and growth, and clear information for the patient or family.

hero.subtitle: CONTACT
hero.title:
A team
ready to listen
hero.description: Need an assessment, orthodontic care, conservative treatment, surgery, or implantology? Our group practice supports you with clear information and personalized treatment planning.

hero.title: A patient-centered care philosophy
hero.description: Beyond specialties, our practice is structured around four clinical principles that guide every treatment plan.

brushing.title: Attentive listening
brushing.description: Dedicated explanation time is included in every consultation to understand the patient's needs, priorities, and medical context.

flossing.title: Personalized treatment plans
flossing.description: Each plan is evolving, coordinated across specialties, and adapted to age, function, and long-term stability goals.
